Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: this is a detailed and well structured supply chain description

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the user wants 20 open ended questions that dig deeper into insights issues improvements and decision implications

Text: the questions should avoid sql or technical solutions and instead provoke strategic thinking

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: for example how would geopolitical risks affect component sourcing what if automation displaces workers

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: how do we balance cost and sustainability in shipping

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the questions should also touch on emerging trends like ai circular economy and regulatory changes

Name: Validation - PE
